text:
Once upon an untamed wilderness, deep in a landscape untouched by time, there lived a curious little wolf named Willow. She wasn't like any wolf you'd ever see; she had this almost human intelligence. Every morning she would wake up in the soft dawn light, explore every nook of her territory, count rocks, and dream about the humans who dared cross into her world.

One day, while sniffing around an old oak tree, Willow stumbled upon an abandoned campsite. There were ancient lanterns, half-eaten meals, and what looked like ashes from a fire. Intrigued, she snatched a rusty spoon from a pot. With her acute senses, she detected sweet wine clinging to its surface.

After a snack break under the stars, Willow fell asleep dreaming of a kind human who might one day share her world. She dreamt she was a friend to these people, telling them tales of wonder and teaching them about her kind.

When morning came, Willow set out to
